name: Saline Solution
description: Isotonic 0.9% sodium chloride solution identical to commercial nasal sprays and wound washes — Cochrane-reviewed for rhinosinusitis and standard post-surgical recommendation.
replaces: Nasal spray, wound wash, saline eye rinse ($4–8)
effectivenessNote: Identical to commercial — 0.9% NaCl. Cochrane review supports nasal irrigation. Doctors prescribe post-surgery. Full marks.
warnings: CRITICAL: Use boiled-and-cooled or distilled water only for nasal irrigation — never tap water (risk of amoebic infection)
Neti pot technique has a learning curve
scienceNote: Cochrane review: effective for rhinosinusitis. Thins mucus, promotes cilia function, flushes allergens. Pharmaceutical treatment at bulk ingredient prices.
